issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Platformer with Tiled tilemap and coin overlap
scenarios.rationale: Baseline knows Phaser scenes broadly but is imprecise about make.tilemap/getObjectLayer/setCollisionByProperty and physics.add.overlap wiring; treatment lifts the documented tilemap + arcade group + camera.startFollow pattern exactly.

scenarios.name: Pixel-art Phaser config that fits any viewport
scenarios.rationale: Scale config options (pixelArt, roundPixels, Phaser.Scale.FIT, CENTER_BOTH) are documented widely so baseline does reasonably well, while treatment matches the exact GameConfig snippet.
